title: WOMEN'S CLINIC - 211info
text: ADVENTIST HEALTH WOMEN'S CLINIC WOMEN'S CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full range of women's health services. 10101 SE Main Street Suite 3001 Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-4pm (503) 261-4423 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 261-4423 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus and MAX stations nearby. Located in Professional Office Building 2 on the 3rd floor. Services: Women's Health Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
